name: Institutional Traders
pain_points: Fragmented liquidity across exchanges
Manual funding rate monitoring at scale
Compliance and reporting overhead
Counterparty risk across multiple venues
language_style: Formal, data-driven, risk-aware. Emphasize Sharpe ratios, drawdown metrics, and compliance.

name: DeFi Treasury Managers
pain_points: Idle treasury capital earning sub-optimal yield
Smart contract risk from yield farming
Governance pressure to deploy capital productively
Lack of delta-neutral strategies accessible on-chain
language_style: DeFi-native, protocol-literate. Reference TVL, APR vs APY, smart contract risk, and governance.

name: Advanced Retail Traders
pain_points: Funding rate alpha decays quickly when manual
Difficult to hedge across exchanges simultaneously
High fees erode thin funding rate margins
Information asymmetry vs institutional players
language_style: Direct, practical, example-heavy. Use concrete numbers, step-by-step explanations, and real scenarios.

name: Family Offices
pain_points: Crypto allocation pressure from next-gen principals
Unfamiliarity with perpetual futures mechanics
Need for institutional custody and compliance
Volatility concerns for conservative mandates
language_style: Conservative, wealth-management tone. Emphasize risk mitigation, legal structure (Wyoming LLC), and fiduciary alignment.

name: DAO Treasuries
pain_points: Treasury diversification beyond native token
Governance bottlenecks for capital deployment
Lack of sustainable yield sources
Transparency requirements for token holders
language_style: Community-oriented, governance-aware. Reference proposals, multisig, on-chain transparency, and token holder alignment.
